package.name: g1_description
package.description: Unitree G1 robot description package. PHASE 4A — Skeleton structure only. Joint names, frames and inertias are PROVISIONAL. Pending synchronization with official Unitree USD assets from huggingface.co/datasets/unitreerobotics/unitree_sim_isaaclab_usds DO NOT treat as final until Phase 4B validation on MIT VM.
